user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Azure Ridge Partners.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-08 09:02 EST
Subject: territory planning - Action Required

Just checking in on the territory planning proposal. Our CFO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 16:23 EST
Subject: URGENT: territory planning Issue at Azure Ridge Partners

Just checking in on the territory planning proposal. Our CFO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: territory planning Discussion - Azure Ridge Partners
Date: 2024-01-08
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is territory planning.

[00:07:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on budget approval and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:09:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:14:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is cost optimization.

[00:18:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:20:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:23:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:26:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:29:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:33:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:37:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.
